arts.ttl: Udinese Set to Onboard Former Inter and Roma Target
arts.sum: Oumar Solet has been linked with a Serie A move more than a few times in previous windows, and he has found a perch at Udinese. The defender had been attached to Inter and especially Roma when José Mourinho was at the helm. The post Udinese Set to Onboard Former Inter and Roma Target appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Torino maintain Serie A lead as Napoli and Udinese stay close behind
